/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--exclude-libs,ALL -shared  -o IRComplexityPlugin.so CMakeFiles/IRComplexityPlugin.dir/src/FeatureExtractor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IRComplexityPlugin.dir/src/Plugin.cpp.o  /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMCore.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMBinaryFormat.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMRemarks.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMBitstreamReader.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMTargetParser.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMSupport.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a -lrt -ldl -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libzstd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtinfo.so
